title: ERROR X
description: A creepy mod will destroy your world...
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eba9a43e8847bdc1edcdbe5e8528616b4ddb7a56.png)


                                          FAQ
What is this mod?
-The error x mod is a horror malware mod will broke your world and turn it to an HELL

How the events work?
-The event works in minecreaft day timer (24000 ticks), evrey to many ticks, a random event will run

What's the entities?
-There are 2 entities:
<details>
<summary>Spoilers!</summary>

ERROR X
-The main entity in this mod, he only appers in night, make such noises and make your screen so colorful
</details>
<details>
<summary>Spoilers!</summary>

GLITCH
-The side entity in this mod, he stalking on animals and mobs, evrey time you killed any them
</details>

Is there mods have the same idea?
-Yes:
The Broken Script,Inside the system,Split Self

Is there safe version of this mod?
-No, don't ask why


                WARNING BEFORE PLAYING THIS MOD


--THIS MOD CAN OPEN APPS


--THIS MOD CAN SHOW POPUP MASSEGE


--THIS MOD LOAD JUMPSCARES AND FLASHLIGHTS


--THIS MOD SHOW YOUR PC USERNAME


--THIS MOD NEEDS GECKOLIB TO PLAY



--THIS MOD IS SAFE, IT'S HARMLESS
